llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 7.1 and 7.2 (Bond Program Action Items - Approval of Construction Agreement for Roy Cloud School with Mar Con Builders and Adoption of Resolution #9) were moved from Action Items to Consent Items during the Changes to the Agenda section.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Is there a motion to approve been moved? Elisa? Yeah. Second. Celia? Second. And a roll call vote, please.
